close_reason: min_durable_version wired through Demux→Shale. WAL trimming gated on confirmed durability watermark.
description: Shale currently never trims segments automatically (only during recovery). Add durable_up_to parameter to Log.pull that reports durability progress, and automatically discard segments when safe. Files: shale/server.ex, shale/facts.ex, shale/segment_recycler.ex
title: Add durable_up_to parameter and automatic segment trimming in Shale
